infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MooveFree uses the microphone for Push-to-Talk communication with the visually impaired user.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MooveFree needs your location to transmit real-time GPS to the caretaker.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow MooveFree to access the microphone for Push-to-Talk.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow MooveFree to access location to transmit GPS coordinates.
